html:
2026-0585
2026-06-11DNDNational Defence ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Military Police Complaints CommissionRe-appointment of Panagiotis (Peter) Lambrinakos of Ottawa, Ontario, who is not an officer or non-commissioned member of the Canadian Forces, nor an employee of the Department of National Defence, as a part-time member of the Military Police Complaints Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Military Police Complaints Commission
precis: Re-appointment of Panagiotis (Peter) Lambrinakos of Ottawa, Ontario, who is not an officer or non-commissioned member of the Canadian Forces, nor an employee of the Department of National Defence, as a part-time member of the Military Police Complaints Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years.
